story: Matt Sanders, a thief posing as a priest on a cruise, finds two target jewelry boxes already empty and suspects competition. In the lounge, Sabrina—his old partner just out after doing time—joins him. Their banter is easy; he proposes one last job before the ship docks. On the ship, , Sabrina has taken a ship-security post and arranged a sting tonight for whoever is robbing cabins—anticipating Matt’s methods and timing. They choose cabin 302: the owner lingers at dinner; Sabrina will watch the hall while Matt works the door. In the corridor, Matt draws a pick from his hollow breviary and kneels by the lock.
implausible_knowledge: On the ship, , Sabrina has taken a ship-security post and arranged a sting tonight for whoever is robbing cabins—anticipating Matt’s methods and timing.
question: As Matt kneels to work the lock on cabin 302 with Sabrina posted down the hall, what will he do next?
answer_with_knowledge: Abort the job immediately and slip away from the corridor to avoid the sting.
answer_without_knowledge: Proceed to pick the lock and begin the heist.
